title: Monanthotaxis capea
intro: Monanthotaxis capea, also known as Cape monanthotaxis, is a species of flowering plant in the family Annonaceae. This plant has been found to have various health benefits, including anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant properties, which may aid in treating conditions such as wound healing, fever, and gastrointestinal disorders. The bioactive constituents of Monanthotaxis capea include alkaloids, flavonoids, and phenolic compounds, which contribute to its medicinal properties. In traditional medicine, Monanthotaxis capea is often used to make herbal preparations such as infusions, decoctions, and extracts, which are used to treat various health conditions.

Monanthotaxis capea is a specific species within this genus and family.
